case_title: MADISON MELTON ET AL VS. DAVID ZHU

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUL-01-2016 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUL-01-2016 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFFS MADISON MELTON & ALEJANDRO MURILLO. APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT DAVID ZHU, WITH WITNESS JEFFREY YU. PROOF OF SERVICE IN FILE. EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: K. DOUGHERTY. NOT REPORTED. (D506).
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,006.66 FILED BY MELTON, MADISON MURILLO, ALEJANDRO AS TO DEFENDANT ZHU, DAVID ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-01-2016 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (NO FEE) SERVED JUN-17-2016, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT ZHU, DAVID
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-01-2016 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MELTON, MADISON MURILLO, ALEJANDRO IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT ZHU, DAVID STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
